exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Expected browser binary location, but unable to find binary in default location, no 'moz:firefoxOptions.binary' capability provided, and no binary flag set on the command line Host info: host: 'codespaces-cff5d6', ip: '127.0.0.1' Build info: version: '4.17.0', revision: 'e52b1be057*' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-1044-azure', java.version: '25.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, moz:debuggerAddress: true, moz:firefoxOptions: {args: [--headless, --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage]}}]}]
